hypothesis: A multi-day pullback reclaim continuation shadow entry may surface trend-continuation candidates with useful forward returns and limited same-day A/B overlap.
single_causal_variable: multi-day pullback reclaim continuation shadow entry pattern

production_promotion_reason: Shadow-only source audit. Requires stable multi-window forward returns and a real strategy replay with sizing, slot competition, and exits before any production change.
